summary: StoryViewerPage and Dashboard card routing fix testing complete. All features verified: (1) GET /api/stories/viewer/{story_id} works without ownership check - test user can view admin's story, (2) StoryViewerPage renders correctly with title, story text, episode navigation, and action buttons, (3) Dashboard CONTINUE badge cards route to /app/story-viewer/{jobId} (consumption), (4) Dashboard TRENDING/NEW cards route to /app/story-video-studio (creation), (5) No regressions on story-battle, story-chain-timeline, and war pages.
critical_code_review_comments: StoryViewerPage.jsx: Consumption-first viewer page correctly implemented with video player, story text, episode navigation, and secondary creation CTAs
Dashboard.js: Card click routing correctly splits CONTINUE badge (story-viewer) vs TRENDING/NEW (story-video-studio)
story_multiplayer.py: GET /api/stories/viewer/{story_id} uses get_optional_user for public access without ownership check
test_credentials: Test User: test@visionary-suite.com / Test@2026#, Admin: admin@creatorstudio.ai / Cr3@t0rStud!o#2026
seed_data_creation: Used existing battle-demo-root (owned by admin) with 3 episodes. Test user successfully viewed admin's story via viewer endpoint.
context_for_next_testing_agent: StoryViewerPage and Dashboard routing fix fully tested. Key findings: (1) Viewer API at /api/stories/viewer/{story_id} works for any authenticated user without ownership check, returns story data including title, story_text, output_url, thumbnail_url, scene_progress, multiplayer fields, and creator_name, (2) StoryViewerPage at /app/story-viewer/:jobId renders with data-testid='story-viewer', shows title, story text, episode navigation (3 episodes for battle-demo-root), Next Episode button (outline), Remix button (rose), Create Episode and Fork/Remix secondary CTAs, (3) Dashboard card routing: CONTINUE badge cards route to /app/story-viewer/{jobId}, TRENDING/NEW cards route to /app/story-video-studio, (4) CTA text: CONTINUE shows 'Continue watching', others show 'Create your version', (5) No regressions: story-battle, story-chain-timeline, war pages all working correctly.

backend_tests.test_viewer_endpoint_with_test_user: PASS - Test user can view admin's story (no ownership check)
backend_tests.test_viewer_returns_required_fields: PASS - All required fields present (job_id, title, story_text, output_url, thumbnail_url, scene_progress, multiplayer fields, creator_name)
backend_tests.test_viewer_returns_correct_story_data: PASS - Returns correct data for battle-demo-root (title='The Crystal Maze')
backend_tests.test_chain_endpoint_returns_episodes: PASS - Chain endpoint returns episodes for navigation
backend_tests.test_chain_episodes_have_required_fields: PASS - Episodes have job_id, title, chain_depth, continuation_type

dashboard_card_routing.continue_card_to_viewer: PASS - CONTINUE badge card routes to /app/story-viewer/{jobId}
dashboard_card_routing.trending_card_to_studio: PASS - TRENDING badge card routes to /app/story-video-studio
dashboard_card_routing.continue_watching_cta: PASS - CONTINUE cards show 'Continue watching' CTA
dashboard_card_routing.create_version_cta: PASS - TRENDING/NEW cards show 'Create your version' CTA

features_verified.viewer_api_public_access: GET /api/stories/viewer/{story_id} works for any user without ownership check
features_verified.viewer_api_fields: Returns title, story_text, output_url, thumbnail_url, scene_progress, multiplayer fields, creator_name
features_verified.story_viewer_page_consumption_first: Video player, story text, episode navigation shown first, creation CTAs secondary
features_verified.cta_text_differentiation: CONTINUE shows 'Continue watching', others show 'Create your version'
features_verified.no_regressions: story-battle, story-chain-timeline, war pages all working
